nasb.text: Then your fame went forth among the nations on account of your beauty, for it was perfect because of My splendor which I bestowed on you,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: And your renown went forth among the nations because of your beauty, for it was perfect through the splendor that I had bestowed on you, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 你的名聲因你的美麗傳遍列國，你全然美麗，是因為我加在你身上的榮美。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 你的美貌名扬四方，因为我给你的华贵使你美貌无比。这是主耶和华说的。
